name: @anthropic/antigravity-vscode
description: Antigravity Workflow VS Code 集成层 — workflow control plane + optional ArkTS LSP

antigravity.strictTrustMode.description: Enable strict trust mode for the Antigravity daemon. When enabled, artifact signature verification failures and trust policy violations block instead of warning.

antigravity.federationFailPolicy.description: Controls behavior when remote worker federation fails. 'fallback' uses local execution, 'fail-closed' blocks the node.
